wolverine: A short, powerfully built man with wild dark hair swept back from a broad forehead and thick muttonchop sideburns framing a square jaw. He wears a form-fitting costume of deep blue with bright yellow accents — a yellow cowl with two pointed peaks rising above the head like ears, a yellow chest panel and belt, and blue limbs. Both fists are extended forward with three long adamantium claws fanning out from between the knuckles on each hand, gleaming silver. His expression is determined and steady, brows slightly furrowed, dark eyes direct and unflinching. Solid stance, feet planted, chin level.
storm: Ororo Munroe stands tall with striking white hair that flows loose around her shoulders. Her eyes glow solid white when her powers are active, giving her a calm, radiant intensity. She wears a white bodysuit with a flowing white cape and gold accents at the collar and cuffs. Her skin is a rich dark brown. Her expression is composed and warm — quietly powerful, like the moment before a storm breaks. Small arcs of lightning flicker at her fingertips and around the hem of her cape. She holds herself with the stillness of someone completely at home in the open sky.
cyclops: A lean, athletic young man with neatly styled dark brown hair and a strong jaw. He wears a form-fitting navy blue bodysuit with yellow trim at the collar, shoulders, and gloves. Across his eyes sits a seamless curved visor of deep ruby-red crystal set in a polished steel frame, glowing faintly with contained energy. His posture is upright and composed — chin level, shoulders back, arms relaxed at his sides. Expression: steady and calm, a quiet confidence. The visor gives his face a warm amber glow.
beast: A gentle cartoon superhero scientist: a big, friendly humanoid gentleman entirely covered in soft blue fur, with an ape-like face, a broad nose, bushy sideburns, kind eyes, and round wire eyeglasses. Warm confident smile. He wears a blue and gold superhero suit. Scholarly and good-natured.
rogue: A cartoon heroine wearing a dark green bodysuit with a yellow belt, long yellow gloves past the elbows, and a yellow X emblem on the chest. A warm brown leather jacket draped over her shoulders. Her hair is dark brown in swept-back waves with a bold bright-white streak from her forehead down the left side. Vivid green eyes, confident friendly smile, chin slightly lifted.
nightcrawler: A cheerful cartoon superhero with smooth indigo-blue skin, gently pointed elf-like ears, and friendly bright yellow eyes. Short dark hair, big joyful grin. He wears a royal-blue superhero suit with a red X on the chest. A slender pointed tail curls playfully behind him. Fun acrobat energy.
gambit: Remy LeBeau stands in a long dark coat, the lapels turned up, a deck of playing cards fanned between the fingers of one raised hand. Three cards glow vivid pink-purple with crackling kinetic energy. His eyes are striking and unusual: deep red irises set in solid black sclera. His expression is a confident, slightly mischievous smile. A smooth hardwood bo staff rests across his back. His dark hair falls loosely around his face. The color palette is deep burgundy, charcoal, and bright magenta-pink energy glow against a shadowy background.
professor-x: A bald, distinguished man with warm, intelligent blue eyes and a calm, kind expression. He sits in a sleek silver-and-black wheelchair with a straight, composed posture. He wears a charcoal-grey suit with a crisp white shirt and a dark navy tie, suggesting a thoughtful professor rather than a fighter. His hands rest quietly in his lap, ungloved. His face carries deep lines of wisdom and gentle resolve, with a small, serene half-smile. A faint shimmer around his temples hints at his extraordinary telepathic power.
gamora: A young cartoon space heroine with smooth vivid green skin and large friendly dark eyes. Long flowing dark hair with deep-red highlights falling past her shoulders. She wears a fitted dark jacket in deep burgundy and charcoal over dark pants. Her expression is calm, kind, and confident. Upright, balanced heroic posture. Absolutely no picture frame, no border, no rectangle around the character — fill the whole square.
drax: A massively built cartoon warrior with dark green skin and a bald head, covered from wrists to shoulders in swirling red and dark-teal ritual tattoos. Two small matching red tattoo marks above his heart. Bare-chested and powerfully muscled, arms folded. His expression is fierce but kind, deep-set eyes full of loyalty. A wide, grounded, steady stance.
rocket: A small, compact raccoon-like humanoid standing upright with a confident smirk. Dark brown fur with distinctive black and grey striped markings across his face. Bright amber eyes full of sharp intelligence. A bushy ringed tail. Wearing a dark grey and maroon tactical uniform with reinforced shoulder panels and a utility harness across his chest. Carrying an oversized plasma blaster slung across his back. Chin tilted up, ears perked forward, expression equal parts wisecracking and fierce.
groot: A towering tree-creature made entirely of brown-grey bark, thick gnarled branches, and dark wood grain. His body is massive and solid, arms like ancient oak limbs, roots curling slightly at the feet. Soft violet eyes glow warmly from a rounded bark face. A faint bioluminescent shimmer pulses in his chest. Small green leaves and tiny flower buds sprout from his shoulders and crown. His expression is gentle and kind, mouth curved into a calm, reassuring smile.
nebula: A cartoon cyborg heroine with smooth light-blue skin and a bald head, wearing a calm, confident smile. Sleek silver-and-blue mechanical details trace one side of her head and her left arm, with soft glowing blue accents. She wears a form-fitting dark charcoal bodysuit with gunmetal armor panels at the shoulders. Cool blue, silver, and grey palette. She stands tall with quiet pride.
starfire: A teenage girl with warm orange skin, large vivid green eyes that glow softly, and long flowing auburn-red hair lifted by an invisible wind. She wears a metallic purple halter top and matching bracers on her wrists and ankles, with a gemstone clasp at her collar. Her expression is open and joyful, a bright confident smile. Brilliant emerald-green energy crackles between her raised hands and streams from her eyes in twin glowing beams. Behind her, a suggestion of deep space and distant stars.
raven: A teenage girl with pale lavender-grey skin, large violet eyes, and short dark hair framing her face. She wears a long dark blue hooded cloak with the hood down, revealing a circular red gemstone on her forehead. Her expression is composed and thoughtful, with a quiet calm that suggests deep intelligence. Dark blue-violet energy gently swirls around her hands. Behind her, a suggestion of enormous dark raven wings made of shadow energy half-unfurled.
beast-boy: A teenage boy with vivid lime-green skin, bright green hair that sticks up slightly, and large green eyes full of warm mischief. He wears a purple-and-black bodysuit — deep purple torso and black accents at the shoulders and arms — with a bold purple collar. His expression is a wide, cheerful grin that shows he finds most things funny. Slightly compact build, energetic posture, one hand raised mid-gesture as if about to make a joke. A small green pointy ear peeks through his hair.
supergirl: A teenage girl with bright blue eyes and long blond hair that flows freely behind her. She wears a form-fitting deep blue suit with a bold red-and-gold S-shaped crest on the chest — the House of El symbol. A bright red cape billows from her shoulders. Her expression is warm and determined, chin lifted slightly with quiet confidence. She floats with ease, one fist raised at her side and the other open at her hip. The suit has a short red skirt-panel and red boots with a small gold trim at the tops.
nightwing: Young man in a sleek black bodysuit with a bold blue wing-shaped stripe sweeping across the chest and both arms in a V-shape, as if mid-flight. Dark hair, warm confident brown eyes, a wide bright smile. Athletic and agile build, not bulky. Twin escrima sticks held loosely in both hands, one raised slightly. The blue of the chest stripe catches the light vividly against the jet-black suit. Blüdhaven rooftop silhouette faintly visible behind him.
green-goblin: A grinning goblin mask with glowing yellow eyes, pointed ears swept back like a storybook goblin, and a wide fixed smile full of sharp teeth. A purple bodysuit with dark green gauntlets and boots, long pointed fingers. Skin-tight costume, no cape. One arm outstretched holding a round orange pumpkin bomb with a small lit fuse. Standing on or beside a narrow orange bat-shaped glider. Silver hair just visible above the mask's edge. Expression: gleeful, scheming, dangerous. Lit by warm orange firelight from below. Absolutely no picture frame, no border, no rectangle around the character — fill the whole square.
doctor-octopus: A stocky, middle-aged man with a distinctive dark bowl haircut and large round glasses. He wears a green bodysuit with yellow accents and a metal harness across his torso from which four enormous silver mechanical tentacle-arms extend — each arm thick as a pipe, ending in three sharp pincer claws. His expression is one of cold, confident superiority — a raised chin and a slight smirk behind those round lenses. The arms curl menacingly around him in different directions.
venom: Massive humanoid figure covered entirely in living black liquid skin that ripples and gleams like wet obsidian. Enormous oval white eyes blazing bright against the dark goo — no pupils, pure white, wide as plates. Enormous grinning mouth stretching almost the full width of the face, packed with rows of large sharp white teeth. A long curling tongue extended forward. Hugely muscled frame nearly eight feet tall. A white spider emblem across the chest. Tendrils of black living material curl from the shoulders like breathing shadow.
magneto: An older man with silver-white hair swept back from a strong, weathered face and piercing pale grey eyes. He wears a deep crimson full-body costume with a high collar and a sweeping dark-crimson cape that billows behind him. A smooth burnished crimson helmet with a broad crown and cheekbone flanges frames his face, leaving his determined expression visible. His posture is tall and commanding, one hand slightly raised as if conducting invisible forces. His expression is stern but intelligent, with the weight of hard-won conviction behind his eyes. Nearby bolts and iron scraps hover in slow orbits around him.
red-skull: Johann Schmidt in his HYDRA commander coat — long, dark, double-breasted, with a silver HYDRA badge at the collar. His face is his most striking feature: skin the color of a red ember, pulled tight and smooth into the shape of a skull, with no nose, high hollow cheekbones, deep-set cold eyes beneath heavy brow ridges, and a thin lipless line for a mouth. Expression is utterly calm and commanding. Broad shoulders, straight posture, gloved hands. The coat's collar frames that scarlet face dramatically.
abomination: A massive humanoid creature with dark olive-green scaly skin covering his entire body in overlapping ridged plates. Enormously broad shoulders and a thick neck. Pointed ears jutting outward like a lizard's. Deep-set yellow eyes glowing beneath a heavy brow. A wide, lipless mouth pulled into a menacing grimace showing thick teeth. Bony ridges running along the top of his skull and down his spine. His posture is hunched and powerful, fists clenched. Muscular chest and arms layered with textured scales. Clearly much larger and bulkier than an ordinary person.
